name: maestro
description: Unified work-item workflow with pluggable backends (files/gitea/github/gitlab/linear/jira): inbox triage, review, spec + plan, implementation, UAT, codebase review, and session wrap-up. Uses Superpowers as the execution engine for brainstorming, planning, TDD, and subagent-driven development.

interface.shortDescription: Work-item workflow with pluggable backends for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Unified work-item workflow with pluggable backends (files/gitea/github/gitlab/linear/jira): inbox triage, review, spec + plan, implementation, UAT, codebase review, and session wrap-up.
defaultPrompt: Use Maestro to set up work-item tracking with a pluggable backend for this repository.
Use Maestro to triage inbox items and turn them into structured work items.
Use Maestro to review the codebase and capture confirmed findings in the inbox.
